title: Entra CBA Certificate Authority Scoping
snippet: Tenant admins can now restrict specific CAs to defined user groups. Essential for environments with multiple PKI hierarchies — prevents over-broad certificate trust.

title: Entra CBA Issuer Hints
snippet: Users on multi-certificate devices will only be prompted to select certificates trusted and valid for the tenant. Reduces sign-in errors with no behavior change for the certificates themselves.

title: Enforce CA Policies Including MFA on Every PIM Activation
snippet: Reauthentication with Conditional Access is now GA for PIM role activations. Require MFA on every privileged role activation without workarounds. Implement this if you haven't already.

title: Configurable Token Lifetime Policies

title: Account Discovery for Connected Apps (Entra ID Governance)
snippet: Generates discovery reports to identify orphan accounts in connected applications that aren't assigned to the enterprise app in Entra. Good for access hygiene audits.

title: Entra External ID Federation with Workforce Identities
snippet: Users can sign in to External ID (customer-facing) apps using their workforce Entra ID via standards-based federation. Reduces duplicate accounts for internal-facing consumer apps.

title: App-based Branding Themes
snippet: Assign different sign-in branding experiences to specific applications within a single tenant. Previously, branding was tenant-wide only.

title: License Usage Page in Entra Admin Center
snippet: Visibility into Entra ID P1, P2, and Suite license consumption. Shows feature usage mapped to license type with 6-month trends. Useful for license right-sizing conversations.

title: GSA iOS Client
snippet: Global Secure Access client on iOS/iPadOS leverages existing MDE deployment — no additional agent required. Routes traffic through Microsoft SSE for M365, internet access, and private access.

title: MIM 2016 Service Pack 3
snippet: SP3 updates SQL Server, SharePoint, and Exchange compatibility and adds Azure SQL Database with managed identity auth support for the Synchronization Service. If you're still running MIM, apply SP3.

title: macOS Platform SSO during Automated Device Enrollment
snippet: PSSO now runs during ADE registration, giving users immediate Entra ID resource access at first desktop login. Requires pre-enrollment configuration. This is the baseline expected experience for ADE macOS deployments.

title: Enhanced App Inventory for Windows
snippet: Improved data freshness, richer app metadata, and new controls to scope which devices contribute to inventory. Windows-first; additional platforms coming. Useful for identifying outdated or risky software at scale.

title: EPM Support-Approved Elevations for All Device Users
snippet: Endpoint Privilege Management now accepts support-approved elevation requests from any user of a device, not just the primary/enrolling user. Fixes a real gap for shared device scenarios.

title: Edge 139 Security Baseline

title: Apple DDM for Required LOB Apps (iOS/iPadOS 18+)

title: macOS Recovery OS Password Policy
snippet: Admins can configure and rotate a recovery OS password to prevent users from booting company-owned Macs into recovery mode and bypassing MDM. Password visible in per-setting status report with appropriate RBAC permission

snippet: New TeamViewer integration replaces the existing connector. If you're on the old connector, you have 12 months to migrate before functionality breaks. Begin migration planning now.

title: Hotpatch now default for all eligible Windows devices
snippet: GA, May 2026 Windows security update. Opt-out available at tenant level or per quality update policy. Review your rings before it hits.
